  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Package
jline.lang

Packages that use jline.lang
Package
Description
jline.api
This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
jline.examples
This package contains several example models
jline.lang
Classes to declare basic elements of a model
jline.lang.layered
This package contains the classes used the specify LayeredNetwork objects
jline.lang.nodes
This package contains the classes used the specify Network objects
jline.lang.sections
Classes that model the individual sections that form a Network node
jline.lang.state
Classes that model the state of a network and its individual nodes
jline.solvers
This package contains the solver superclasses and related data structures
jline.solvers.ctmc
Classes that implement solution approaches based on Continuous-Time Markov Chain solution
jline.solvers.env
Classes that implement solution approaches for stochastic models in random environments
jline.solvers.fluid
Classes that implement solution approaches based on mean-field and fluid approximations
jline.solvers.fluid.analyzers
Classes that embody different fluid ODE analysis algorithms
jline.solvers.fluid.odes
Classes that generate the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) used in the Fluid solver
jline.solvers.fluid.smoothing
Classes that implement the smoothing method for transient fluid analysis
jline.solvers.jmt
Classes that rely on the Java Modelling Tools (JMT) suite solvers
jline.solvers.ln
Classes that define LINE's Layered Network (LN) solver
jline.solvers.mam
Classes that analyze networks using matrix-analytic methods
jline.solvers.mva
Classes that analyze networks through Mean-Value Analysis (MVA)
jline.solvers.mva.analyzers
Classes that embody different mean-value analysis methods
jline.solvers.mva.handlers
Classes for coordinate the execution and performance metric estimation in MVA-based algorithms
jline.solvers.nc
Classes that analyze networks using Normalizing Costant (NC) methods
jline.solvers.nc.analyzers
 
jline.solvers.ssa
Classes that analyze networks using Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA)
jline.solvers.taussa
Classes that analyze networks using Tau-Leaping Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (TauSSA)
jline.solvers.taussa.events
 
jline.solvers.taussa.metrics
 
jline.solvers.taussa.state
 
  • Classes in jline.lang used by jline.api
    Class
    Description
    JobClass
    Superclass representing a class of jobs
    Network
    A queueing network model
    NetworkStruct
    Class summarizing the characteristics of a Network object
  • Classes in jline.lang used by jline.examples
    Class
    Description
    Network
    A queueing network model
  • Classes in jline.lang used by jline.lang
    Class
    Description
    ClosedClass
    Class where jobs perpetually loop without arriving or leaving (Closed class)
    Element
    Superclass for model elements
    Ensemble
    A model defined by a collection of sub-models
    Env.ResetEnvRatesFunction
     
    Env.ResetQueueLengthsFunction
     
    FeatureSet
    Class representing the features of a particular solver
    FiniteCapacityRegion
    Collection of stations with constraints on the number of admitted jobs
    ItemSet
    A set of cacheable items
    JobClass
    Superclass representing a class of jobs
    Model
    Class representing a model supported by the library
    Network
    A queueing network model
    Network.routingMatrixReturn
     
    NetworkAttribute
    Class for auxiliary information stored in Network objects
    NetworkElement
    Class representing an element within a Network object
    NetworkEvent
    Class abstracting an event within a Network model
    NetworkStruct
    Class summarizing the characteristics of a Network object
    NodeParam
    Class for the nodeparam field within NetworkStruct
    RoutingMatrix
    Class representing a probabilistic routing matrix
    Sync
    A synchronization on a NetworkEvent

    Description
    Element
    Superclass for model elements
    Ensemble
    A model defined by a collection of sub-models
    Model
    Class representing a model supported by the library
    Network
    A queueing network model

    Class representing a probabilistic routing matrix

    Superclass for model elements

    A set of cacheable items
    JobClass
    Superclass representing a class of jobs
    Network
    A queueing network model
    NetworkElement
    Class representing an element within a Network object
    NodeAttribute
    Auxiliary class for information stored within a Node object
    OutputStrategy
    Class modelling the output section of a Node
    ServiceBinding

    Description

    A model defined by a collection of sub-models
    Env
    An environment model defined by a collection of network sub-models coupled with an environment transition rule that selects the active sub-model.
